## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Why this change matters

Explain the problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test or tooling improvement

## Testing

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes if relevant.

- [ ] Docs updated if needed
